scripts.build:exe: bun run prep:exe && bun build --compile --minify server/index.ts --outfile dist-bin/kecy-server
scripts.build:exe:all: bun run prep:exe && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-windows-x64 server/index.ts --outfile dist-bin/kecy-server-win-x64 && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 server/index.ts --outfile dist-bin/kecy-server-mac-arm64 && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-x64 server/index.ts --outfile dist-bin/kecy-server-mac-x64
